ballot_measures.number: Allow Public Financing of Election Campaigns Measure
ballot_measures.title: Allow Public Financing of Election Campaigns Measure
ballot_measures.description: Allow the state and local governments to create programs that provide candidates with public funds under spending limits and eligibility rules. This legislative referendum is on the California 2026 ballot.

ballot_measures.number: Eliminate Successor Election at a State Officer Recall Election Amendment
ballot_measures.title: Eliminate Successor Election at a State Officer Recall Election Amendment
ballot_measures.description: Eliminate the successor election when a state officer is recalled, thereby leaving the office vacant until it is filled according to state law. This legislatively referred constitutional amendment is on the California 2026 ballot.

ballot_measures.number: Vote Requirements for Initiatives Requiring Supermajority Votes Amendment
ballot_measures.title: Vote Requirements for Initiatives Requiring Supermajority Votes Amendment
ballot_measures.description: Require initiatives that change vote thresholds to supermajority votes to pass by the same vote requirement as is being proposed. This legislatively referred constitutional amendment is on the California 2026 ballot.
